uhfJump2Boot() - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
uhf固件进入boot模式准备升级,调用此函数后需要延时2秒再调用 IUHF.uhfStartUpdate() (uhf firmware enters boot mode to prepare for upgrade)
UHFJump2Boot(byte) - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.LinuxUHFAndHFAPI

uhfJump2Boot() - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.linux.usb.UsbLinuxDeviceAPI
uhf进入boot模式 ，开始升级之前需要调用此函数
UHF enter boot mode, need to call this formula before upgrade
